DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-14-2003 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- CROSS-DEFENDANT SAMUEL G KRESS' DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT -- 1st c/a - sustained with leave to amend to plead wiht specificity bad faith withholding taxes and maintenance, (e.g. cross-defendant has present ability to pay; refuses to do so) and to plead injury to Genya Kress, as an individual. 2nd c/a - sustained without leave to amend. Cross-complainant has 10 days leave to amend to conform to Court's ruling. (DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2003 Continued To May-14-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
